sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root נָטָה, like the Gr. κλίνη, from κλίνω).

(1) a bed-(a) for sleeping or sickness, Gen 47:31 48:2 49:33 Ex. 7:28 .-(b) such as a person lay on at table, Est 1:6 Eze 23:41.-(c) on which one takes a little rest (sofa), Amo 3:12 6:4 .

(2) a litter, Son 3:7.

(3) a bier, a litter on which the dead were carried, 2Sa 3:31.
